name: Code Runner
description: Execute Python code safely in a sandbox. Calculate math, process data, run algorithms, convert units, generate outputs. Use for any computation the agent needs to perform rather than estimate or guess.
author: MUSE
planner_hint: ONLY for actual computation: math, data processing, algorithms, unit conversion. Do NOT use for summarizing, structuring, or formatting text — the agent handles that directly.

actions.description: Evaluate a math expression or solve a calculation from natural language
Execute provided Python code and return the output
